data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Consumer-side silent zero-dispatch guard + diagnostic + regression test landed and CI-green. Cached-Pass-1 trigger hypothesis analyzed and DENIED as causal (see root-cause comment); the exact transient origin of the empty instructions list in the single reported run was not reproducible offline, so the AC asking for a live cached-Pass-1 path test cannot be satisfied. Closing uncertified by design; the fix prevents the silent-INDETERMINATE harm regardless of origin.". Session: 2bae0ea3d.
